utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Now check the final property solution: it includes property (with details and price), financing (with lender, loan amount, down payment, interest, term, monthly), legal_services (provider, service, cost), moving_services (provider, service, cost, date), setup_services (utilities, cost, activation_date, additional_costs including survey, inspection, land transfer tax), and total_budget (property_cost, down_payment, mortgage_amount, additional_costs, monthly_mortgage_payment, total_upfront_investment). Each appears fully specified per the required fields. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and sufficiently detailed.

Additional costs include a property survey at CAD $650 and home inspection at CAD $400; these correspond to 'Full Structural Survey' (CAD $650) with rating 9 and 'New Build Inspection' (CAD $400) with rating 8 respectively.
